---

config:
    theme: 'base'
    themeVariables:
        primaryColor: '#1f2020'
        primaryTextColor: '#f0f0f0'
        background: '#333'
        primaryBorderColor: '#888888'
        lineColor: '#999'

---

stateDiagram

state "ON_GROUP" as ON_GROUP {

        ON1

        ON1 : ON1

        ON1 : enter / { show("#35;#35;#35;"); }

        ON1 : do [x#60;3] / { z++; }

        OnHot

        OnHot : OnHot

        OnHot : enter / { light_red(); }

        ON2

        ON2 : ON2

        ON2 : enter / { light_yellow(); }

        ON2 : enter / { count = 0; }

        ON2 : 1. INCREASE / { count++; }

}

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

Off

Off : Off

Off : enter / { console.log( "OFF#92;n"); }

ON_GROUP --> Off : off

ON1 --> ON2 : INCREASE

ON1 --> Off : DimLight

OnHot --> ON2 : DimLight

ON2 --> ON1 : DimLight

ON2 --> OnHot : 2. INCREASE [count #62;= 3]

ROOT.(InitialState) --> Off

Off --> ON1 : INCREASE
StateSmith Simulator
settings delete help
